zh.lifeSummary: 當William Lovel d'Ivry於1102年之前出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾易福-拉-巴塔爾時，他的父親Ascelin d'Ivry11098歲，母親Isabel Breteuil23歲。他與Mathilde Beaumont結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1170年之前在英國英格蘭諾福爾可多金，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯古內艾-素-馬內。

nameMeanings.name: Lovel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lovell
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Lovel d'Ivry was born before 1102, in Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Ascelin d'Ivry, was 11098 and his mother, Isabel Breteuil, was 23. He married Mathilde Beaumont. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 1170, in Docking, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Lovel d'Ivry est né avant 1102, à Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Ascelin d'Ivry, avait 11098 ans et sa mère, Isabel Breteuil, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde Beaumont. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 1170, à Docking, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Lovel d'Ivry vor 1102 in Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ascelin d'Ivry 11098 und seine Mutter Isabel Breteuil 23. Er hat Mathilde Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 1170 in Docking, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Lovel d'Ivry è nato il prima del 1102 nel Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Ascelin d'Ivry, aveva 11098 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Breteuil, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde Beaumont. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1170, nel Docking, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: William Lovel d'Ivryが1102年以前にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアイvリ-ラ-バティイルで生まれた時，父Ascelin d'Ivryは11098歳，母Isabel Breteuilは23歳であった。Mathilde Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1170年以前にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクドクイングで死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-サイント-デニスゴウルナイ-スル-マルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Lovel d'Ivry(이)가 1102년 이전 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 이브리-라-바테이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ascelin d'Ivry(은)는 11098세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Breteuil(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Mathilde Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1170년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 독잉에서 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-세인트-데니스 고우른아이-수-마니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Lovel d'Ivry nasceu antes 1102, em Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Ascelin d'Ivry, tinha 11098 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Breteuil, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde Beaumont. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1170, em Docking, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Lovel d'Ivry родился перед 1102 г. в местности иври-ла-батеилл, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Ascelin d'Ivry было 11098 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Breteuil, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde Beaumont. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 1170 г. в местности доккинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности гоурнеи-сур-марн, сине-сеинт-денис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

Murió antes de 1170, en Docking, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.
